nasb.text: For the cherubim spread their wings over the place of the ark, so that the cherubim made a covering over the ark and its poles.

esv.text: The cherubim spread out their wings over the place of the ark, so that the cherubim made a covering above the ark and its poles.

cnv.text: 基路伯在約櫃上面張開翅膀，遮蓋著約櫃和抬約櫃的槓。

ccb.text: 基路伯天使展开翅膀，遮盖约柜和抬约柜的横杠。
